title: Seayonce Hocus Poke Us
description: A mystical dating show for all the lonely souls and hungry holes out there, from comedy cabaret legend, the award winning Ghost Whisperer... Séayoncé! Do you believe in love afterlife? Séayoncé has used her psychic powers and seen the past, present and future of your love life and its time to be honest and accept...darling it's dead! So let's res-erect it! A show filled with camp excellence, haunting hilarity and epic cabaret ballads from the UK's premier witch and her musical murderous accomplice Leslie Ann, aka cabaret icon Robyn Herfellow. Created by one of the country's most prominent queer comics Dan Wye. Its spellbound to be an occult classic! ★★★★★ - Deadline It’s“ a hilarious, outrageous, and fabulously queer show” ★★★★★ - Wee review “hilarious” ★★★★★ - Broadwaybaby "the perfect drag duo that transcend comedic talent"
